episode.title: MTG Fast Finance EP 370: March of the Machine Previews
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and go over all the latest March of the Machine card previews.
